title: woof plan
description: Stage 3 Breakdown output: ordered stories implementing an epic. Validates structural shape only; cross-artefact invariants (satisfies[] subset of EPIC.md.observable_outcomes[].id, depends_on[] subset of stories[].id, contract-decision one-to-one ownership, no scope overlap) are enforced by Stage-5 helper Check 5, not by this schema.

schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Tool selects the matching schema from woof/schemas/v<n>/.

goal.description: One-sentence prose summary of the epic outcome.

id.description: Story ID. Sequential per epic, no leading zeros (S1, S2, ..., S10, ...).

intent.description: Prose, 1-2 sentences: what this story produces.

create.description: Repository-relative paths this story creates. Stage 5 Check 3 fails if any path pre-exists at story start.

modify.description: Repository-relative paths this story modifies. Stage 5 Check 3 fails if any path is created or deleted by the diff.

satisfies.description: Outcome IDs from EPIC.md.observable_outcomes this story realises. Zero-outcome stories are rejected by the Stage 3 prompt; the schema enforces minItems=1.

contract_decisions.description: Contract-decision IDs from EPIC.md.contract_decisions this story implements (as surface creator) or consumes. Empty array is valid for stories that touch no CDs.

depends_on.description: Story IDs that must reach status=done before this story runs. Subset relationship to stories[].id is checked by helper, not schema.

count.description: Estimated number of new tests. Not enforced at Stage 5; planning predicts intent.

types.description: Test families (e.g., unit, integration, e2e, regression). Open-vocabulary; project-defined.

empty_diff.description: True iff this story completed without producing a diff because earlier stories' broader changes already realised its outcomes. Only meaningful when status=done; Stage 5 Check 7 (G - story incomplete) honours this flag and skips the non-empty-diff requirement.
